title: The Courthouse Becomes the Goal
description: The rescue group fights through Enies Lobby’s defenses and turns the courthouse into the next major objective.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this part follows Blueno, Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. The rescue group fights through Enies Lobby’s defenses and turns the courthouse into the next major objective.

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: But this island is full of guards!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: As we've gone through each island,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: He, too, with every island he's visited,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Look, we're almost at the courthouse.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Alright, we've stopped one of them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sodom!! Hold on, don't collapse yet!!!

summary: The rescue group fights through Enies Lobby’s defenses and turns the courthouse into the next major objective.
